description.en: Latent Dirichlet Allocation gave topic modeling a clean probabilistic form. Documents are mixtures of topics, topics are distributions over words, and inference estimates the hidden structure that produced observed text. LDA became a standard model for exploratory text analysis and probabilistic machine learning education.
description.zh: 潜在狄利克雷分配为主题模型提供了清晰的概率形式。文档是主题的混合，主题是词的分布，推断过程估计生成可见文本的隐藏结构。LDA 成为探索性文本分析和概率机器学习教学中的标准模型。

html.en: Text collections needed methods that discovered structure without hand-labeling every theme. LDA made the hidden-topic assumption explicit and probabilistic.
html.zh: 文本集合需要无需手工标注每个主题就能发现结构的方法。LDA 把隐藏主题假设明确写成概率模型。

html.en: Each document draws a topic mixture; each word chooses a topic and then a word from that topic’s distribution.
html.zh: 每篇文档抽取一个主题混合；每个词先选择主题，再从该主题词分布中生成词。

html.en: Experts generally treat LDA as a classic probabilistic topic model and a teaching example for generative modeling. Its long-term legacy is interpretability through latent structure, which remains useful even when neural embeddings and transformers perform better in many applications.
html.zh: 专家通常把 LDA 视为经典概率主题模型，也是讲解生成式建模的教学范例。它的长期影响在于通过潜在结构提供可解释性，即使神经嵌入和 Transformer 在许多应用中表现更好，这一点仍有价值。

method.en: Bayesian topic model with Dirichlet priors
method.zh: 带 Dirichlet 先验的贝叶斯主题模型

material.en: JMLR paper, author page, and implementation docs
material.zh: 《机器学习研究杂志》 论文、作者主页与实现文档

demo.en: Documents mix topics; topics emit words
demo.zh: 文档混合主题；主题生成词

text.en: A document can combine several themes instead of belonging to one class.
text.zh: 一篇文档可以组合多个主题，而不是只属于一个类别。

text.en: Each topic is represented as probabilities over words.
text.zh: 每个主题表示为词上的概率分布。

text.en: Approximate inference estimates hidden topic assignments from observed words.
text.zh: 近似推断从可见词估计隐藏主题分配。

description.en: Primary JMLR source for LDA; local images redraw topic mixtures and plate notation.
description.zh: LDA 的 《机器学习研究杂志》 原始来源；本地图重画主题混合和 plate notation。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。

action.zh: 打开 《机器学习研究杂志》 论文
